category_title: Low-achieving vocational students in a computer maintenance class
minimal_context: The student is sitting at a PC after a two-session exam and is asked to post their circuit drawings from the exam to their blog.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now that the exam is over, please post your answers for questions 1 and 2, the drawing circuits, to your blog.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: We just had an exam for the first two sessions. I feel exhausted.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You still need to complete this assignment today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I feel annoyed. I don't want to do another assignment right now because I don't like to work under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your blog on the PC and start drawing the circuits.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Opens a new browser tab) I'm not doing it. I'm going to open YouTube and then play Counterstrike with the others.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Now that the exam is over, please post your answers for questions 1 and 2, the drawing circuits, to your blog.

STUDENT: We just had an exam for the first two sessions. I feel exhausted.

TUTOR: You still need to complete this assignment today.

STUDENT: I feel annoyed. I don't want to do another assignment right now because I don't like to work under pressure.

TUTOR: Please open your blog on the PC and start drawing the circuits.

STUDENT: (Opens a new browser tab) I'm not doing it. I'm going to open YouTube and then play Counterstrike with the others.

task.content: post to their blog which was question 1 and 2 from the exam (drawing circuits)

context.time_context: In week 3 of November students had an exam in the first two sessions, and after that they were given another assignment

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: given another assignment to post to their blog... after the exam
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: didn't want to do the assignment

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: didn't want to do the assignment
behavior_patterns.internal_state: didn't like to work under pressure or maybe they felt exhausted after the exam
